titleStmt.title: SII 5.1381: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 1381. (A.R. No. 18 of 1897). ON THE EAST WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pukaḻmātu viḷaṅkac cayamātu virumpa nilamakaḷ nilava malarmakaḷ puṇara Urimaiyiṟ ciṟan=ta maṇimuṭi cūṭi
laikeṭa villavar kulaitara Enaimannava ririyaluṟ ṟiḻitarat tikkanaittu n=ta n cakkara naṭātti virasiṁ hāsa nattu Ulakuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiru
n=ta ruḷiya korājakecaripatma rāna cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻade vaṟku yāṇṭu 36 Āvatu [ja]yaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu
vūr Uṭaiyār de vatānam melmalai Āṟṟurnāṭṭu Uṟiyūrāna rā jamāttāṇḍa ccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhai yom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu
maṇṭalattut tenkaraiyil rājentra coḻavaḷanāṭṭu nakaril nakaruṭaiyān veḷān rājentra coḻanāna rājaśekhara mūven=ta veḷān Āḷuṭaiyār tiruvūṟal Uṭai
yāṟkut tiruvītimaṭappuṟamāka Ivvūril nāṅkaḷ viṟkiṟa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷuṟ periyeri yetirvāyil kaṭapperi Uṭpaṭak kiḻpāṟkellaiy kaliniṅku vāykkālukku meṟkum
tenpāṟkellai melānkarai vaṭavoḻuṅkaikku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai kaṭapperikarai yuṭpaṭak kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkellai Ammaṇarai vaṭavoḻuṅ
kaikkut teṟkum Innāṟpāṟkellai yuṭpaṭṭa nilattila celkālāna nilamum tiruttalāna nilaṅkaḷu nti ruttik koḷḷakkaṭavatāka nāṅkaḷ viṟṟa patinaṟucāṇ
kolāṟ kuḻi patināyiramum patināyirattināl nilam Aiyveli Innilam Aiyvelikkum pon tu potātatukku Ikkaliṅkuk kālukku meṟkuninṟuṅ kaḷḷiyoḻuṅkaiye kiḻakkuno
kkik kiṭan=ta nilattile koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Innilam Aiyvelikkumā veliyonṟukkuk kācu Iraṇṭākak kācu pattum Iccollappaṭṭa veḷān rājentra coḻanāna rājaśekhara muven
taveḷānpakkal poruḷaṟak koṇṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvūṟaluṭaiyārkkut tiruvitimaṭappuṟamāka viṭakkaṭava nilam viṭṭu vilaiyaṟa viṟṟukkuṭuttom muṟcollappaṭṭa rāja māttāṇḍa
ccaruppetimaṅkalattu sabhai yom Innilattukku velikkācu Uṭpaṭṭa cillan=ta- rāyam kāṭṭavuñ collavum peṟātomākavum Innilattukku niriyn=ta paṭi nir pāccik
koḷḷappeṟuvatākavum Orukālāvatum Irukālāvatum mukkālāvatum viṟṟu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytukuṭuttom Itaṟku Ituve poruḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolai yā
vutākavum Ituvallatu veṟuporuḷmāvaṟutip poruḷcilavolai kāṭṭap peṟātatākavum Ipparici licain=tu poruḷaṟak koṇṭu vilaiyāvaṇañ ceytu kuṭuttom Immahāsa
bhai yom riyiṭai Uṭpaṭṭār ceyta pāvattaip paṭuvār .
Digital edition of SII 5.1381 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
